overview: A professional hostel management web application featuring a KPI dashboard, complete resident profile management, visual floor/room occupancy grid, and payment tracking with overdue highlighting. All data is stored locally in the browser.
features: Dashboard with occupancy stats and monthly revenue
Full resident profile management (add, edit, delete)
Floor-wise visual room grid with occupied/vacant states
Payment tracking with overdue highlighting in red
Search and filter residents by name, room, or floor
Sidebar navigation with mobile responsive hamburger menu
Monthly payment summary and status toggling
